title: Trader
description: Adds a simple and secure trading system, allowing players to send trade requests to each other. It integrates with Vault for economy support.
body:
# 📦 Trader

A **Spigot/Paper** plugin that provides a secure and convenient trade command to make exchanging money and items between players easier.


**Trader** adds a simple and secure trading system, allowing players to send trade requests to each other. It integrates with **Vault** for economy support.

---

## ⚙️ Permissions

| Permission     | Description                   | Default |
| -------------- | ----------------------------- | ------- |
| `trader.trade` | Grants full access to trading | ✅ True  |

---

## 💬 Commands

| Command           | Usage          | Description                              | Permission     |
| ----------------- | -------------- | ---------------------------------------- | -------------- |
| `/trade <player>` | `/trade Steve` | Sends a trade request to another player. | `trader.trade` |

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Download the plugin `.jar` file.
2. Place it in your server’s `plugins` folder.
3. Ensure **Vault** is installed.
4. Restart or reload your server.
